name: Andrealphus
description:
"What the fuck was that?" Andrealphus probably, as the cowboy imp rode out with his horse into the streets with Stolas tied up behind him.

A Marquis of hell and member of the Goetia family, Andrealphus is the brother of Stella, and by extension the brother-in-law of Stolas and the uncle of Octavia.

(Probably gonna update this after the new episode of Helluva Boss comes out)
creator: HorseMan
